name: basic_query
description: Simple factual query in print mode
given: Hex is installed and API key is configured
when: User asks a simple math question via -p flag
then: Hex returns correct answer with exit code 0
validates: Basic print mode functionality and API communication

name: file_operations
given: Hex has write_file and read_file tools enabled with permission-mode=auto
when: User requests to create a file with specific content and read it back
then: Real file is created on disk with correct content and can be verified
validates: File I/O tools work with real filesystem

name: code_generation_execution
description: Generate executable code and verify it runs
given: Hex can write files and system has Python interpreter
when: User requests a Python script that calculates Fibonacci numbers
then: Generated code executes successfully and produces correct output (55 for 10th Fibonacci)
validates: Code generation produces syntactically valid and semantically correct programs

name: multi_tool_workflow
description: Complex task requiring multiple tools in sequence
given: Hex has read_file, write_file, bash, and edit tools enabled
when: User asks to read file, count lines with bash, and append new content
then: Hex uses multiple tools correctly and file is modified as expected

name: grep_glob_search
given: Hex has grep and glob tools, test directory with Go files
when: User asks to find all .go files containing 'calculate' (case-insensitive)
then: Hex identifies correct files using grep and glob tools
validates: Code search capabilities with real file tree

name: json_output_format
when: User requests JSON output for a simple query
then: Output is valid JSON with expected schema (id, content, model, usage)
validates: Structured output formatting for programmatic consumption

name: web_research
description: Fetch and analyze real web content
given: Hex has web_fetch tool enabled and internet connectivity
when: User asks to fetch content from httpbin.org/json and extract information
then: Hex fetches real web content and correctly extracts slideshow title
validates: Web research tools work with real HTTP endpoints

name: error_handling
description: Graceful handling of errors and edge cases
given: Hex encounters non-existent files and permission errors
when: User requests to read missing file or permission-denied file
then: Hex handles errors gracefully without crashing, reports issues appropriately
validates: Error handling and resilience with real filesystem errors

name: subagent_explore
given: Hex can spawn Explore subagents with read-only tools (grep, glob, read)
when: User requests exploration of authentication code in a test codebase
then: Real Explore subagent process spawns, searches files, identifies all auth-related files (login.go, session.go, handlers.go)
validates: Subagent framework launches real child processes with specialized configurations

name: subagent_general_purpose
given: Hex can spawn general-purpose subagents with all tools enabled
when: User assigns complex task: read numbers file, calculate sum, write result
then: Real subagent spawns, autonomously executes all steps, produces correct output (524)
validates: Subagent autonomous reasoning and multi-tool orchestration

name: skills_system
given: Custom skill defined in markdown format
when: User asks calculation question that matches skill domain
then: Response shows structured calculation steps matching skill pattern
validates: Skills system influences response behavior and structure

name: mcp_integration
given: Hex has MCP commands (add, list, remove) and mock MCP server (stdio transport)
when: User adds MCP server, verifies config, tests server, removes server
then: Real .mcp.json created with server config, mock server responds to JSON-RPC, server removed cleanly
validates: MCP configuration management and stdio server communication

name: todo_tool_availability
description: Tool availability in print mode vs interactive mode
given: TodoWrite tool exists in hex but is interactive-only
when: User tries to use TodoWrite in print mode (-p flag)
then: Tool is not available in print mode, hex responds appropriately
validates: Tool availability differs between print and interactive modes as designed
